steps.text: Captain, we're entering what I'm calling an anomaly belt: {n:3-9} unexplained readings in the last few minutes. Nothing dangerous. All weird.
Anomaly update: one reading was a flock of birds flying in a perfect question mark. Another was a mattress on the shoulder, which raises its own questions.
We've cleared the belt. Final tally: {n:5-15} anomalies, zero explanations, one excellent story. Science thanks you for driving through it.
